puzzle.title: The Architect of Arrogance
puzzle.intro: In an ancient land ruled by a defiant power, a key individual held a position of influence. This soul was instrumental in the ruler's grand schemes, contributing to their oppressive reign and challenging the divine message. Their legacy is intertwined with a pursuit of worldly might and a denial of truth.
clues: I served a formidable ruler who oppressed a people for generations.
My name is frequently mentioned in the Divine Book alongside this powerful leader.
I was tasked with a grand construction project, a towering structure meant to reach the heavens.
I advised my master to slay the sons of the Children of Israel and spare their daughters.
I was involved in plots and conspiracies against a mighty messenger of Allah.
My end, along with my master and his army, came in the waters of a vast sea.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Leading an army against a sacred house
Building a tower to reach God
Being thrown into a fire for their belief
Being cast into a well by siblings
trial.answer: Building a tower to reach God
